privileged_info_summary: The task configures Moodle cohort-based enrollment for an Engineering program. A site-wide cohort named 'Engineering Program Cohort 2024' with idnumber 'eng2024' is created and populated with exactly 5 synthetic students: eng_alice, eng_bob, eng_carol, eng_dave, and eng_emma. Cohort synchronization enrollment is configured for two target courses: CS110 (Computer Science Fundamentals) and ENG110 (Introduction to Engineering), both in the Engineering category. All 5 cohort members are automatically enrolled in both courses via the cohort sync mechanism. Admin login is admin/Admin1234!. The data is entirely synthetic, created by task setup scripts within a Moodle 4.x environment using MariaDB.
